name: Sprinklr, Inc.
summary: Part I Who We Are Sprinklr provides a Unified Customer Experience Management (Unified-CXM) platform that helps organizations manage customer interactions across channels and teams. Our artificial intelligence (AI)native platform enables customer-facing teams, from Customer Service to Marketing, to collaborate across internal silos, communicate with customers across digital and traditional channels, and leverage AI to deliver better customer experiences at scale.
